highlights.text: Given the powerful bullish trigger here and seasonal strength, I was looking for higher, writing last Tuesday December 23rd at 4pm: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
I wrote on Friday at 4pm: “In a more mild bull case, ES will do some retracement of the monster 220 point leg up we had the last week.
Whenever there is what I call an elevator down sell (a vertical flush that cuts through every support) bulls always get nearly every point of that type of action paid back in the form of a squeeze.
That footprint is my core setup: The Failed Breakdown.
This would mean bulls will get paid back for this action, but only when a Failed Breakdown occurs.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll rewind to Friday December 19th to discuss a powerful Failed Breakdown we had that day at 6820 which ultimately gave us a 170 point move.

post_title: SPX Cools Off After A 5 Day Christmas Rally. Will Today's Dip Get Bought? Dec 30th Plan
